name: Sugar Free Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook raisins in water until almost dry.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the raisins.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
Note: For a cake-like texture, bake in a greased and floured long pan at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
